resume.name: Krishna Sai Vallabhaneni
resume.summary: Aspiring AI Automation Engineer with knowledge of JavaScript, SQL, JSON, APIs, and web development. Currently learning workflow automation and modern development tools while building practical projects and improving problem-solving skills. Eager to learn modern technologies and contribute to real-world projects in a growth-focused organization.

experience.description: Assisted in system administration, hardware configuration, and IT infrastructure maintenance. Configured LAN networks and enabled FTP file sharing across systems. Installed and maintained Windows operating systems and managed user accounts. Performed basic SQL database management and data handling tasks. Supported technical training on networking and operating systems.
